channel.title: AzRoleWatcher
channel.description: Continuously monitor roles and permissions in Microsoft Entra ID and Azure.

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: 1cfa4eac-9a23-481c-a793-bfb6958e836c
Display name: Azure Local Migrate Execute Expert
Description: Grants restricted access on an Azure Local based Azure Migrate project to only perform migration related operations, including replication, execution of migrations, tracking and monitoring of migration progress, and initiation of agentless migrations.
Link: https://management.azure.com/1cfa4eac-9a23-481c-a793-bfb6958e836c?api-version=2022-04-01

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: fd8ea4d5-6509-4db0-bada-356ab233b4fb
Display name: Azure Local Migrate Owner
Description: Grants full access to create and manage Azure Local based Azure Migrate projects including appliance-based discovery and execution of migrations; Also grants ability to assign Azure Migrate Local specific roles in Azure RBAC
Link: https://management.azure.com/fd8ea4d5-6509-4db0-bada-356ab233b4fb?api-version=2022-04-01
